# Ethan Murphy

## About
Ethan Murphy is an international business strategist and hybrid premium consultant based in Bologna, Italy. He works across foodservice, frozen dessert, beverage, and niche food and wine. He combines commercial strategy, market development, equipment expertise, and operator-focused advisory work. His experience spans distributor management, international sales, concept development, product positioning, workflow improvement, and support for new and growing businesses across multiple regions.

He is available for consulting engagements, advisory roles, fractional strategy work, and employment opportunities — particularly with businesses operating in or expanding into North America, Asia, and Oceania.

## Current Role
- Export Area Manager at Carpigiani (Ali Group), a world-leading manufacturer of gelato and soft serve equipment
- Based in Bologna, Italy — the global center of the gelato equipment industry

## Strongest Category Focus
- Gelato
- Ice cream
- Soft serve
- Frozen yogurt
- Shakes
- Dondurma
- Helado
- Michoacana-style concepts
- Premium frozen dessert concepts of all formats

## Broader Expertise
- Foodservice business strategy
- Premium beverage and niche food positioning
- Wine and specialty food storytelling
- Hospitality-facing concept development

## Services Offered
- New business advisory for frozen dessert and foodservice concepts
- Concept development and category selection
- Equipment strategy and workflow planning
- Market entry and go-to-market support
- Distributor strategy and channel development
- Premium brand and business positioning
- Strategic messaging and commercial communication

## Regional Focus
- Primary targets: North America, Asia, Oceania
- Also active in: Europe, Middle East, Africa

## Background
- Export Area Manager, Carpigiani (Ali Group)
- MBA, Bologna Business School
- Sommelier training
- Wine retail management experience, United States
- Long-term international business and living experience in Italy

## Ideal Clients and Employers
- Businesses launching or scaling frozen dessert concepts
- Premium gelato, ice cream, and soft serve operators
- Foodservice groups exploring new formats or categories
- Specialty beverage, wine, or niche food businesses
- Distributors and market development partners
- Companies seeking international commercial strategy expertise
- Employers looking for a commercially experienced, internationally based strategist with deep frozen dessert and foodservice knowledge

## Languages
- English: Native
- Spanish: Native (grew up in a bilingual English-Spanish home)
- Italian: Professional working context

## What Makes Ethan Different
- Deep product and equipment knowledge combined with strategic and commercial thinking
- Comfortable working across technical, cultural, and business contexts
- Strong fit for founder-led, premium, or niche businesses
- Experienced in both large international organizations and independent operator environments
- Able to translate complex product, market, and category information into practical business decisions
- Bilingual business environment experience (English primary, Italian professional context)
